summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect US Equity 2 ETF (AAEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund offered initial investors a way to diversify taxable holdings via a 351 exchange. The actively managed fund seeks to provide market-cap weighted exposure to broad US equities. AAEQ was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

holdings.infoBox: AAEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 352 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.39%, NVIDIA at 7.75%, Microsoft at 5.11%, Amazon.com at 3.78%, and Alphabet at 3.56%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
